nasb.text: Now when the woman of Tekoa spoke to the king, she fell on her face to the ground and prostrated herself and said, “Help, O king.”

esv.text: When the woman of Tekoa came to the king, she fell on her face to the ground and paid homage and said, “Save me, O king.”

cnv.text: 提哥亞婦人進去見王，俯伏在地，叩拜他，說：“王啊！求你幫助我。”

ccb.text: 提哥亚妇人来到王面前，俯伏在地上说：“王啊，求你救救我吧！”
